title: Duplicate hex_encode functions in did.rs and api.rs
description: Both `src/api.rs:23` and `src/did.rs:120` define identical `pub fn hex_encode(bytes: &[u8]) -> String` functions. This is not a bug (they are in different modules and callers use the correct qualified path), but it is unnecessary duplication. The did.rs version exists so backfill in cli.rs can use `crate::did::hex_encode` without pulling in api.rs. Consider: either make one canonical and re-export, or remove the did.rs copy and have cli.rs use `crate::api::hex_encode` for the pubkey hex encoding. Low priority -- cosmetic only.
